title: chrysosplenium trichospermum
intro: Chrysosplenium trichospermum, also known as the golden spleenwort or golden shield fern, is a type of flowering plant in the saxifrage family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce swelling. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including relieving respiratory problems, lowering blood pressure, and improving liver function. Chrysosplenium trichospermum is typically prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
